userId.title: User ID
userId.description: Optional Laravel/backend account ID. Included in the webhook callback payload.

callbackUrl.title: Callback (webhook) URL
callbackUrl.description: Optional URL that receives a JSON POST with the result (success or failure).

webhookAuthToken.title: Webhook auth token
webhookAuthToken.description: Optional Bearer token sent in the Authorization header of the webhook callback.

emailBackend.title: Temporary email backend
emailBackend.description: Which disposable-email API to use for receiving the OTP code.

useProxy.title: Use free proxies
useProxy.description: Attempt 1 uses the host's public IP; remaining attempts rotate through free public proxies.

proxyProtocol.title: Proxy protocol
proxyProtocol.description: Protocol of the free proxies to use.

proxyMaxTries.title: Max proxies to test
proxyMaxTries.description: How many free proxies to validate before giving up on an attempt.

maxAttempts.title: Max registration attempts
maxAttempts.description: Number of fresh-account attempts (each on a different IP) before failing.

otpWaitSeconds.title: Max OTP wait (seconds)
otpWaitSeconds.description: How long to poll the inbox for the verification email before timing out.

credentialsWaitSeconds.title: Credentials provisioning wait (seconds)
credentialsWaitSeconds.description: How long to wait for the trial line to provision and credentials to appear.

requestTrial.title: Request free trial
requestTrial.description: Click the 'Request Trial' button after registering.

fetchCredentials.title: Fetch IPTV credentials
fetchCredentials.description: Extract the Xtream credentials from the credentials page after activation.

iboPlayerEnabled.title: Save to IBO Player
iboPlayerEnabled.description: If enabled, the extracted credentials are pushed to IBO Player via its API.

iboPlayerCookie.title: IBO Player cookie (legacy)
iboPlayerCookie.description: Legacy Cookie header value for iboplayer.com. No longer used for auth; the actor now logs in via MAC + device key below.

iboPlayerMacAddress.title: IBO Player device MAC address
iboPlayerMacAddress.description: Device MAC (e.g. b8:13:a0:e0:6e:83) used to log in and obtain a bearer token (required when IBO Player is enabled).

iboPlayerDeviceKey.title: IBO Player device key
iboPlayerDeviceKey.description: Device key/PIN used with the MAC to log in to iboplayer.com (required when IBO Player is enabled).

iboPlayerPlaylistUrlId.title: IBO Player playlist URL ID
iboPlayerPlaylistUrlId.description: current_playlist_url_id for the IBO Player savePlaylist call.

iboPlayerPlaylistName.title: IBO Player playlist name
iboPlayerPlaylistName.description: Display name for the saved playlist.
